description: Lifecycle state machine template — defines valid statuses, transitions, and state metadata

status.description: Current lifecycle status — must be a valid status from core/enums/STATUS.md

state.description: Operational state of the entity (e.g. active, archived, locked, pending)

previousStatus.description: Status immediately before the current one (for rollback support)

statusFlags.description: Zero or more boolean flags decorating the current status

statusRegistry.description: Valid statuses defined in core/enums/STATUS.md as single source of truth
